Class NodePreorderIterator

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.NodePreorderIterator
public class NodePreorderIterator extends Object

Iterates preorder over the whole sub tree of a given Node.

Instances of this class should always be used instead of recursive method calls because they cause StackOverflowErrors even in small programs.

Attention: The iteration process does not take care of changes in the model. If the containment hierarchy changes during iteration it is possible that elements are left or visited multiple times. For this reason it is forbidden to change the model during iteration. But the developer has to take care about it.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getChildIndexOnParent()
    Returns the child index of next() on its parent.
    protected @Nullable Node
    getNextOnParent(Node node)
    Returns the next element to select if all children of the given Node are visited.
    int
    getReturnedParents()
    Returns the number of returned parent after the previous next() call which where required in order to find the next Node which will be returned by the next call of next().
    boolean
    hasNext()
    Checks if more elements are available.
    @Nullable Node
    next()
    Returns the next Node in the containment hierarchy.
    protected void
    updateNext()
    Computes the next element and updates next().

  • Constructor Details

    • NodePreorderIterator

      public NodePreorderIterator(Node start)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      start - The Node to iterate over its sub tree.

  • Method Details

    • hasNext

      public boolean hasNext()
      Checks if more elements are available.
      Returns:
      true has more elements, false has not more elements.

    • next

      public @Nullable Node next()
      Returns the next Node in the containment hierarchy.
      Returns:
      The next Node.

    • getChildIndexOnParent

      public int getChildIndexOnParent()
      Returns the child index of next() on its parent.

      Attention: Needs to be called before next() is called.

      Returns:
      The child index of next() on its parent or -1 if no parent is available.

    • getReturnedParents

      public int getReturnedParents()
      Returns the number of returned parent after the previous next() call which where required in order to find the next Node which will be returned by the next call of next().
      Returns:
      The number of returned parents.

    • updateNext

      protected void updateNext()
      Computes the next element and updates next().

    • getNextOnParent

      protected @Nullable Node getNextOnParent(Node node)
      Returns the next element to select if all children of the given Node are visited.
      Parameters:
      node - The visited Node.
      Returns:
      The next Node to visit.
